summary: Decent recording (source unknown) captures a strong first set and solid portions of the second, earning a near‑perfect rating.
review: The reviewer gave this show a five‑star rating, noting that most of the first set was excellent and parts of the second set were also very good. No specific comments about the audio source or fidelity were provided, so the recording quality cannot be definitively assessed.
